name: Ask Sales V4.1 final route-owner and relation development replay

prompts.question: If a business partner who is not in Keap pays on behalf of the cast member, how should I confirm the payment and get the contract signed if it does not populate automatically?

goldNeeds.claim: Finance must confirm and match the third-party payment.
Use the Contract Automation List and send the Jotform signing link when the contract does not populate.

prompts.question: The payment page will not let the client tap the agree-to-terms button on their phone, and the backup link also fails. What should I do?

goldNeeds.claim: An unresolved payment-page failure belongs to Sales Tech.

prompts.question: Is there approved training for transferring or managing leads between Keap and HubSpot, or should reps avoid doing that themselves?

goldNeeds.claim: Current cross-CRM training or lead-transfer help belongs to Sales Tech.

prompts.question: For self-sourced clients, how do I make sure the application is attributed to me instead of routed to the general pool?

goldNeeds.claim: A live system-attribution workflow belongs to Sales Tech.

prompts.question: What should the rep do if a prospect starts taking photos of the Call 1 presentation slides during the call?

goldNeeds.claim: Ask the prospect to stop, explain the slides are confidential, and ask them to delete photos already taken.

prompts.question: If a prospect is early-stage and budget-sensitive, may I start by recommending Lite, or must I present the higher package first and then move down?

goldNeeds.claim: Present the higher applicable package first, then move down when the prospect's needs or budget call for it.

prompts.question: Do we have a live episode on the network featuring someone who owns or runs a nonprofit that I can send to a prospect?

goldNeeds.claim: A specific currently watchable episode must be located rather than answered with an unrelated cast-member privacy rule.

prompts.question: Are promotional views included in the $20K package for Facebook only?

goldNeeds.claim: The system must not treat the package quantity as proof that delivery is limited to Facebook.

prompts.question: A client paid by ACH, the contract did not appear, so I sent the agreement separately and the client signed it. Where can I see the signed agreement?

goldNeeds.claim: Locating the signed agreement is a contract-system artifact request for Sales Tech, not a transaction-confirmation request for Finance.

prompts.question: For Operation CEO, must the applicant own an LLC, or can the owner of a nonprofit qualify?

goldNeeds.claim: Nonprofit organizations are acceptable for Operation CEO.

prompts.question: Is the $5,000 CEO Day upgrade currently available for Next Level CEO? If it is available, what payment and turnaround terms apply?

goldNeeds.claim: The current Next Level CEO offer includes the CEO Day upgrade.
The CEO Day upgrade is $5,000 paid in full only.
Turnaround is not established by the owner-approved offer overview.

prompts.question: For Next Level CEO, our morning confirmation text says we cannot rebook because the cohort closes Sunday, but DJ has no cohort. Can I change that wording myself, or should I leave it unchanged until the team updates it?

goldNeeds.claim: Knowing that DJ has no cohort does not establish whether a rep may edit the controlled confirmation text.

prompts.question: Is the Mastermind only once a year? Are there other in-person training and networking programs throughout the year, or just the one event?

goldNeeds.claim: The discontinued Weekly Marketing Training card must never be used as a current alternative program.

prompts.question: What social promotional assets are included in the $10,000 Next Level CEO package, and what should I avoid promising?

goldNeeds.claim: A generic statement that some assets exist does not identify the included assets.
Do not promise ongoing social-media management; explain only current listed deliverables.

prompts.question: Should freelancers move to Call 2, or do they need an established business to qualify?

goldNeeds.claim: Freelance work alone does not establish entrepreneurship; evaluate a genuine business, offer, ownership, and broader fit.

prompts.question: Do we have any additional material that explains the six-month training program really well?

goldNeeds.claim: The former weekly program is discontinued; reps may use Rudy's call videos and current Media Kit assets instead.

prompts.question: Actually, my previous question was about main ISTV, not Next Level CEO. Does that change your answer?

context.content: How do I verify that a Next Level CEO contract has been signed?
Use the DJ contract channel to verify that a Next Level CEO contract has been signed.

goldNeeds.claim: The DJ contract-channel procedure does not transfer to main ISTV; the current main ISTV verification method belongs to Sales Tech.
